strategic_alpha.reasoning: Genuinely novel distribution angle — SMS/messaging as the interface removes all friction; strong VC validation at $300M valuation.

execution_grit.reasoning: Core claim (no signup needed) is verifiable at T1; multi-step automation via SMS is hard to test deeply without real usage.

craft_and_soul.reasoning: Zero-friction onboarding is the highest possible craft signal; iMessage/WhatsApp native feels seamless by design.

value_signal.reasoning: Free no-signup tier is excellent; usage-based pricing opacity is the only concern.

claims.claim: Homepage loads without login and SMS number/QR code visible
claims.evidence: Homepage loads without login and SMS number/QR code visible

claims.claim: Agent demo accessible without signup (free to start claim)
claims.evidence: "Book a 30-minute call. We’ll walk you through the platform and show you how PokeeClaw fits with your team’s work."

claims.claim: Free tier verifiably accessible without credit card
Multi-step automation example visible in public marketing
claims.evidence: "Automate your hardest processes. Delegate the admin noise."

claims.claim: Pricing page or usage-based tier structure accessible
Response quality and latency evaluable in 1-2 test messages
